ticks.reason: First scan. Critical week ahead: fragile US-Iran ceasefire, CPI data Monday, Tuesday holiday gap into Wednesday expiry, Q4 FY26 earnings season ramping up.

Asymmetric plays: ITC (all scenarios), ONGC/BPCL pair, 23500 PE tail hedge. Tuesday holiday gap is structural unpriced risk.
